sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8805" key="a)nqono/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθο-νόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8805.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">browsing on flowers,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg001.perseus-grc1:539" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">539</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
